gtc.app.name: gtc
gtc.arg.add_admin.bundle_ref.help: Yachay chumpi willay qhatu mayqin musuqchasqa kananpaq.
gtc.arg.add_admin.cn.help: Admin API-man yaykunanpaq saqisqa ranti rurasqa sertipikaduq Sutin Hatun.
gtc.arg.add_admin.public_key_file.help: Kay adminpaq PEM/OpenSSH llapanpaq kichasqa kicha willay khipu.
gtc.arg.bundle_ref.help: Bundle ñan/ref: llaqta ñan, file://, oci://, repo://, store://
gtc.arg.debug_router.help: Ejecutar manaraq, stderrman churay tarisqa binario chaymanta args.
gtc.arg.deploy_bundle_source.help: Phuyu desplegador-kunaman qusqa karu bundle paqarinata wakmanta churay (kayhina https://.../bundle.gtbundle).
gtc.arg.remove_admin.bundle_ref.help: Yachay chumpi willay qhatu mayqin musuqchasqa kananpaq.
gtc.arg.remove_admin.cn.help: Qichunanpaq ranti rurasqa sertipikaduq Sutin Hatun.
gtc.cmd.add_admin.about: Llaqta bundlepaq admin ranti rurasqa sertipikaduq maykayninta qillqay.
gtc.cmd.admin.tunnel.about: Desplegasqa bundle admin API-man AWS Session Manager túnelta kichariy.
gtc.cmd.doctor.about: Munasqa Greentic binariokuna PATHpi kanankuta qhaway.
gtc.cmd.install.about: Greentic herramientakunata instalay, munaspa tenant-autorizasqa artefactokunatapas.
gtc.cmd.remove_admin.about: Llaqta bundlemanta admin ranti rurasqa sertipikaduq maykayninta qichuy.
gtc.cmd.start.about: Llaqta utaq karu referencia-manta bundleta qallariychiy.
gtc.cmd.stop.about: Bundle puriyninta sayachiy utaq desplegasqa pachata chinkachiy.
gtc.cmd.update.about: Greentic companion nisqapa llapa binario kunata qhipa 0.4.x versiónman sinchita musuqyachiy.
gtc.err.bin_missing_setup: PATH-pi greentic-setup manam tarisqachu. Kaywan churay: cargo install greentic-setup
gtc.err.install_dir: Instalacion directoriokunata allinta tariy mana atirqachu.
gtc.install.summary_failed: Tenant artefacto instalacion tukurqa ichaqa pantaykunawan.
gtc.install.using_env_key: Tenant llaveqa variable de entorno {env}manta apakuchkan.
gtc.start.err.deploy_failed: qallariychiymanta ñawpaq bundle desplegay mana atikurqachu
gtc.stop.err.destroy_required: kunan desplegasqa target-kunaqa --destroy-ta munanku; destroy mana kaqtin stopqa manaraq rurasqachu
gtc.update.binstall_missing: cargo-binstall manam churashqachu. Ñawpaqta `gtc install` purichiy.
gtc.update.start: Greentic companion nisqapa binario kunata musuqyachispa.
gtc.update.summary_ok: Llapa companion binario kuna allinta musuqyachisqa.
gtc.wizard.title: Greentic Desarrollador Yanapaq
